## Meeting Purpose

[Director standup to discuss recent client interactions, strategies for improving client relationships, and addressing concerns about LLMs and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ambit call went well, with improved client buy-in and articulation of strategy](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [New approach needed for discussing LLMs and SEO with clients, balancing hype with practical considerations](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Team to create FAQ and one-pager on LLM/SEO stance, with regular discussions to refine approach](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Atlas transition causing some client relationship challenges, but presenting opportunities for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

## Topics

### Ambit Client Call Success

  - [Panzarino's articulation of changes and strategy was highly effective](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Client (Aperva) being present and team preparedness were key factors](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Improved buy-in when presenting grander vision and scaling possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Client opened up about their own challenges (e.g., ICP struggles)](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Strategies for Difficult Clients

  - [Importance of showing work progress through artifacts and regular updates](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Need to balance granular edits with broader strategy discussions](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Value in leading clients to organic discovery of platform possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Tying narrative to long-term vision to imply lasting partnership](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

### LLM and SEO Client Concerns

  - [Clients increasingly asking about LLM impact on SEO](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Some clients (e.g., Smith) prioritizing LLM optimization over traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Team needs aligned position and talking points on LLM/SEO balance](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Proposal to create FAQ, one-pager, and hold regular LLM discussion meetings](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

### Content Strategy and Distribution

  - [Discussion on creating public-facing content about LLM/SEO for client reference](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Potential series on company blog about LLM/SEO topics](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Importance of having shareable assets for clients to review independently](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create repository of client FAQs about LLMs and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

  - [Schedule regular (potentially weekly) LLM discussion meetings](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Jason and Dave to shape assets based on collected questions and insights](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Darrell to pursue interview with Kip Boudmire from HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Mara to coordinate with Genevieve on posting about recent work, aligned with site launch](https://fathom.video/share/QeC2KfRB7qc5nyebyKNU4ssqkGoUxGMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
